system.description: God of craft, technology and all those who work by their hands and their mind.
system.title: God of Craft

scriptures.name: Level 1: My Robot Friend
scriptures.description: Summon a human-sized construct friend who can follow orders for an encounter. Casting again dispels previous. Robot Friend: All Stats 2, Guard 2, Health 2, Willpower 4, Defence 0. Cannot fight. Per level, pick upgrade: +1 Str/Con (max 4), Defence 1 (max 4), can fight, or invulnerable to a hazard.

scriptures.name: Level 2: Divine Hammer
scriptures.description: Summon a magical hammer for length of encounter. Ranged attack, single target, medium range. Uses Str. You can target your robot friend to heal instead of harm – each hit heals one Health.

scriptures.name: Level 3: My Robot Fiend
scriptures.description: Expands My Robot Friend with new upgrade options: It can fly. Once per encounter, blast attacks everyone in a room at once. It's giant-sized (Health = 2x Con). It is an expert in a topic.
